'''Kououra''' were predators native to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Despite its disarming appearance, it had a toxic bite. It was [[Diet/Legends#Carnivorous|carnivorous]] with pale tender flesh.<ref name="TBS" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''
